description: Machine-readable release gate evidence consumed by scripts/release-preflight.js. Mark a gate READY only after copying concrete build IDs, URLs, screenshot paths, or reviewer notes into evidence.

eas-build-artifacts.evidence: No EAS Android/iOS build artifact evidence is recorded.

android-device-audio.evidence: No Android physical-device build/install/audio evidence is recorded.

ios-device-audio.evidence: No iOS physical-device/TestFlight build/install/audio evidence is recorded.

ads-iap-device-qa.evidence: No Android/iOS ad-supported v1.0 device QA sign-off is recorded in reports/release-ads-iap-device-qa.md.

store-records.evidence: No App Store Connect or Google Play Console app record evidence is recorded for the ad-supported v1.0 release.

store-credentials.evidence: No App Store Connect or Google Play submit credential evidence is recorded.

store-policy-questionnaires.evidence: Apple age rating/export compliance/content rights/no-official-affiliation review completed against publishing/app-store-listing.md; Google Play content rating/target audience/ads declaration/no-government-affiliation review completed against publishing/google-play-listing.md, publishing/google-play-data-safety.md, and publishing/admob-iap-setup-runbook.md. Local policy evidence recorded in reports/store-policy-questionnaires/store-policy-questionnaires.json; Google Mobile Ads and the 29 SEK Remove Ads IAP are declared for ad-supported v1.0, and no real-money gambling or official-government affiliation claims are present.

privacy-review.evidence: No final Apple privacy labels / Google Play Data safety review against the generated binary is recorded. The review must include Google Mobile Ads, Remove Ads IAP, and ATT/UMP consent disclosures for the ad-supported v1.0 release.

release-owner-approval.evidence: No final release-owner approval for store submission is recorded.

public-urls.evidence: Support URL https://szechunyiu.github.io/Swedish_Civic_Test-public-site/support/ and Privacy Policy URL https://szechunyiu.github.io/Swedish_Civic_Test-public-site/privacy/ returned HTTP 200 from SzeChunYiu GitHub Pages on 2026-05-16. They still need to be entered in the Apple/Google store records.

device-screenshots.evidence: Web-draft screenshots and manifest exist, but final device/store screenshots are not recorded.

submission.evidence: No TestFlight, Google Play internal test, production submission, or post-launch monitoring evidence is recorded.
